channel.title: Headlines - Latest - Google News
channel.copyright: Copyright © 2026 Google. All rights reserved. This XML feed is made available solely for the purpose of rendering Google News results within a personal feed reader for personal, non-commercial use. Any other use of the feed is expressly prohibited. By accessing this feed or using these results in any manner whatsoever, you agree to be bound by the foregoing restrictions.

  2. World Cup tickets: $11,000 tickets put on sale for final  BBC
  3. FIFA raises top ticket price for World Cup final to $10,990 during glitch-hampered sales reopening  CNN
  4. Fifa raises top ticket price for World Cup final to $10,990, up from $1,600 in 2022  The Guardian
  5. FIFA hikes World Cup prices, again. A finals ticket can now cost as much as $11,000  NPR

item.title: Jamie Dimon's warning: More geopolitical risk for America than since WWII - Axios
item.description:
1. Jamie Dimon's warning: More geopolitical risk for America than since WWII  Axios
  2. If Jamie Dimon's right, AI could mean the workweek ends at lunchtime on Thursday  Business Insider
  3. "The Axios Show": Jamie Dimon eyes post-JPMorgan media venture  Axios
  4. Jamie Dimon on Geopolitical Risk, AI, and the Future of the Economy  The Acquirer's Multiple
  5. Jamie Dimon: AI Could Bring 3.5-Day Workweeks, Longer Lives  eWeek

item.title: FSIS Issues Public Health Alert For Frozen, Dinosaur-Shaped, Ready-To-Eat Chicken Nuggets Due To Traces Of Lead - fsis.usda.gov
item.description:
